## What does this PR do?

A brief description of the change and why it's needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New mode or bundle ID update
- [ ] Feature / enhancement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Testing

- [ ] Tested on macOS with a real controller
- [ ] Tested the affected mode(s)
- [ ] Built `.app` with `./scripts/build_mac_app.sh` and verified it launches

## Notes

Anything the reviewer should know (edge cases, known limitations, follow-up work).
